content:
💡 CrosshairJs | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enhance website user experience by replacing the standard mouse cursor with an engaging, animated, and interactive custom cursor that provides visual feedback on hover.
✨ Key Features: • Zero Markup - automatic style injection and DOM element handling • Magnetic Hover - snaps and scales to links and buttons • Customizable - control over colors, sizes, and blend modes
📖 Summary: Crosshair.JS is a lightweight JavaScript library that replaces the default browser cursor with a customizable, animated crosshair. It offers smart hover effects that make the cursor magnetically snap and scale to interactive elements like links and buttons, enhancing user experience with smooth animations and visual feedback.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
